blocks.text: There are some simply amazing materials that have come out in the last 50 or so years that are hugely underutilized in the jewelry/art space.

I think that incredibly fine (<1mm diameter) chainmail made from modern superalloys would feel nearly like cloth if made properly, and be incredibly durable if made as welded closed link construction. Monel is particularly interesting, but various Ni/Ti compositions are really super durable and incredibly workable. https://x.com/goth600/status/1906556820753146021
